signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start sending and tracking crypto payments in minutes.
signup.terms: I agree to the <tos>Terms of Service</tos> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

verify.successBody: Your account is active. You can log in now.
verify.sentBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
verify.sentBodyNoEmail: We sent you a verification link. Click it to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successBody: If an account exists with that email, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Your new password must be at least 10 characters.
resetPassword.missingToken: This reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new one from the forgot-password page.

linking.googleBody: The email {email} is already registered via Google. Log in with Google to continue.
linking.passwordBody: The email {email} is already registered. Log in with your password.
linking.githubBody: The email {email} is already registered with GitHub. Continue with GitHub to sign in.

errors.email_already_exists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.email_not_verified: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.password_not_set: This account uses Google sign-in. Log in with Google.
errors.account_suspended: This account has been suspended. Contact support.
errors.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.token_already_used: This link has already been used.
errors.email_mismatch: Email does not match this link.
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.password_too_common: This password is too common. Choose a stronger one.
errors.password_breached: This password has appeared in a data breach. Choose a different one.
errors.terms_not_accepted: You must accept the terms to continue.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.github_invalid_token: GitHub authentication failed. Please try again.
errors.github_no_verified_email: Your GitHub account has no verified email. Please verify one on github.com/settings/emails and retry.
errors.github_api_error: GitHub is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.github_network_error: Network error contacting GitHub. Please retry.
errors.email_already_registered: This email is already registered with another sign-in method.

whySignIn.heading: One account. All your chains. Everywhere.
whySignIn.subheading: Sign in to sync your crypto experience across devices — your routes, history, contacts, and alerts follow you wherever you go.

routes.title: Saved routes
routes.description: Name your favorite payment paths and reuse them in one click. No more rebuilding cross-chain flows from scratch.

history.title: Cross-device history
history.description: Every transaction you've ever made, searchable and filterable. Access from any browser, any device — always in sync.

contacts.title: Encrypted contacts
contacts.description: Your address book with labels, notes, and safety warnings. Never paste a wrong address again.

notifications.title: Smart notifications
notifications.description: Email alerts when transactions confirm, fail, or when conditions you set are met. Stay in control without watching the screen.

hero.subtitle: Send, swap, and route crypto across any chain — move money anywhere in the world in one click. Every transaction comes with compliance and reporting built in, so you're covered from day one without the legal headache.

twoPaths.title: One platform. Two ways in.
twoPaths.subtitle: Integrate RSends into your backend, or use the dashboard if you'd rather not write code. Same routing, same ledger, same compliance — whichever path you take.

developers.title: Build with the API
developers.body: REST endpoints and SDKs for sending, swapping, and routing crypto across chains. Typed webhooks, double-entry ledger, AML screening, and DAC8 reporting — all built in, so you don't engineer compliance from scratch.
developers.b1: Send, swap, route via REST API

businesses.title: Use the dashboard
businesses.body: A complete interface for moving, swapping, and splitting crypto — no code required. Flow lets you route a single transaction across chains, optimizing for cost, speed, or compliance with one click.
businesses.b1: Send and swap from a clean UI

send.oracleSignatureInvalid: Invalid Oracle signature: on-chain signer mismatch. Check ORACLE_PRIVATE_KEY.
send.insufficientLiquidity: Insufficient liquidity in pool. Reduce the amount.
send.transactionInProgress: Transaction in progress on another tab

routes.nonEvmDesc: Cross-chain automation coming soon. Currently available on EVM chains.
routes.autoForwardDesc: Incoming funds automatically route to your chosen wallets
routes.splitRoutingDesc: Divide payments across multiple wallets with custom ratios
routes.smartGasDesc: Optimized fees with configurable speed and limits

monitor.nonEvmDesc: Cross-chain monitoring coming soon. Currently available on EVM chains.

splits.nonEvmDesc: Cross-chain splits coming soon. Currently available on EVM chains.

groups.nonEvmDesc: Cross-chain distribution coming soon. Currently available on EVM chains.

wizard.duplicateAddressError: Duplicate recipient addresses not allowed in a split
wizard.tipTokenFilter: Only forward these tokens (leave empty for all)
wizard.tipGasStrategy: Gas price strategy — Economy saves fees, Fast prioritizes speed
wizard.tipAutoSwap: Automatically swap received tokens before forwarding
wizard.tipSchedule: Only forward during specific days and times
wizard.tipNotifications: Get notified when funds are forwarded

exploreTokens.title: Live markets.
exploreTokens.subtitle: Track every token across 11+ chains — on desktop or mobile. Real prices, updated every 30 seconds.

markets.pageSubtitle: Every token across 11+ chains. Prices update every 30 seconds.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your notifications, connected wallets, and account security.

email.title: Email
email.description: We send security and account emails to the address linked to your Google account.

loginNewDevice.label: New device sign-in alerts
loginNewDevice.description: Get an email whenever your account is accessed from a device or network we haven't seen before.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.description: Real-time alerts for transactions and price moves, delivered to your Telegram.

comingSoon.title: Telegram notifications — coming soon
comingSoon.description: We're finishing the Telegram bot. Connect your account here as soon as it's live.

wallets.title: Linked wallets
wallets.subtitle: Connect the EVM wallets you own. You'll sign a message once per wallet so we can prove ownership — no on-chain transaction, no gas.
wallets.teamBanner: These wallets are linked to {orgName} and visible to all members.
wallets.viewerDisabledHint: Ask an admin or operator to manage wallets.
wallets.adminOnlyHint: Only admins can change the primary wallet or unlink.

autoSuggest.title: Link the wallet you're connected with

empty.title: You haven't linked any wallets yet.

errors.wallet_already_linked: This wallet is already linked to your account.
errors.max_wallets_reached: You've reached the maximum of 10 linked wallets. Unlink one to add another.
errors.chain_not_supported: This chain isn't supported yet. Switch to a supported network in your wallet.
errors.chain_family_unsupported_v1: Only EVM wallets can be linked for now. Solana and Tron are coming.
errors.nonce_expired_or_used: The signing challenge expired or was already used. Please try again.
errors.nonce_context_mismatch: The signing challenge didn't match the wallet. Please try again.
errors.signature_mismatch: The signature didn't match the wallet address. Please sign again with the right account.
errors.signature_malformed: The signature couldn't be verified. Please try again.
errors.invalid_address: That address doesn't look like a valid EVM address.
errors.cannot_demote_primary: Promote another wallet to primary first, then you can change this one.
errors.siwe_unavailable: Wallet linking is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.not_found: That wallet wasn't found on your account.
errors.primary_race: Another change happened at the same time. Please try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Create programmatic keys to access your account through the rSends API. Each key is shown once at creation — store it somewhere safe.
apiKeys.teamBanner: These API keys are shared with everyone in {orgName}.
apiKeys.viewerDisabledHint: Ask an admin or operator to manage API keys.
apiKeys.adminOnlyHint: Only admins can revoke API keys.
apiKeys.limitReached: You've reached the maximum of {max} active keys. Revoke one to create another.

empty.title: You haven't created any API keys yet.

docs.title: Using your API key
docs.body: Pass the key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Treat it like a password — anyone with this key can act on your behalf within its scopes.

errors.max_keys_reached: You've reached the maximum of 5 active keys. Revoke one to create another.
errors.not_found: That key wasn't found on your account.
errors.no_token: You're not signed in. Please sign in and try again.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.auth_unavailable: The auth service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

scopes.transactions:write: Create and send transactions on your behalf
scopes.account:read: Read your account profile and settings

modal.scopesHint: Select only the permissions this key needs. You can revoke it at any time.
modal.saveWarning: This is the only time you'll see this key. Copy it now and store it somewhere safe — if you lose it, you'll need to create a new one.
modal.savedCheckbox: I've saved my key somewhere safe

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Review where you're signed in, which devices we remember, and manage your account.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Every device that's currently signed in to your account. Sign out from anything you don't recognise.

devices.title: Known devices
devices.description: Devices we've seen you sign in from. Forgetting a device will trigger a new-device alert the next time it signs in.

deletion.pendingBody: Your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted in {days} days, on {date}. You can still cancel until then.

danger.title: Delete account
danger.description: Permanently delete your account and every piece of data we hold for you. This cannot be undone.

deleteModal.title: Delete your account?
deleteModal.body: This will permanently erase {email} and every associated record — routes, contacts, transactions, wallets, sessions, and devices. After a 30-day grace period there is no way to recover the account.
deleteModal.reasonPlaceholder: What made you want to leave? (helps us improve)

errors.account_deleted: This account has been deleted and can no longer be accessed.
errors.invalid_confirmation: The confirmation phrase didn't match. Please type it exactly.
errors.cannot_revoke_current_session: You can't sign out the device you're currently using. Use the sign-out button in the header.
errors.not_found: That item wasn't found on your account.
errors.user_not_found: We couldn't find your account. Please sign in again.
errors.no_token: You're not signed in. Please sign in and try again.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.auth_unavailable: The auth service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

modal.title: Invite a new member
modal.subtitle: They will receive an email with a link to join this organization.

errors.not_a_member: You are not a member of this organization.
errors.insufficient_role: You do not have permission to do that.
errors.cannot_remove_owner: The organization owner cannot be removed.
errors.cannot_remove_last_admin: You cannot remove the last admin.
errors.cannot_demote_last_admin: You cannot demote the last admin.
errors.max_members_reached: This organization has reached the maximum number of members.
errors.already_member: That user is already a member.
errors.invite_already_pending: An invite is already pending for that email.

invite.title: You've been invited
invite.subtitle: Join {org_name} as {role}.
invite.emailMismatchWarning: This invite was sent to {invite_email} but you are signed in as {user_email}. Please sign in with the right Google account to accept.
